title: Formatting Dates
scenario: Given a date in a specific format, write a prompt that will generate the same date in a different format (e.g., from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD).
constraints: Must use a standard date format converter

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated date accurately converts the given date to the desired format.
Verify if the generated date meets the given constraints.
Check if the generated date has a neutral tone.
